codeReview.summary: New file tests/devin-installer.test.ts adds 17 well-structured integration tests across 6 describe blocks covering: symlink install (2 tests), copy install (2 tests), global paths (4 tests), agent recognition (3 tests), listInstalledSkills attribution (2 tests), and end-to-end consistency (4 tests). Tests use temp directories with proper try/finally cleanup matching the pattern from tests/installer-symlink.test.ts. Mock usage for detectInstalledAgents follows the same vi.spyOn pattern from tests/list-installed.test.ts. All 6 validation criteria (VAL-INT-002 through VAL-CROSS-001) are covered. Commit also includes standard mission infrastructure updates (handoffs, progress-log, reviews, state/features.json status transitions). No source code changes to src/ — test-only feature as expected.

issues.description: Unused imports: 'beforeEach' and 'afterEach' from vitest are imported but never used. The file uses per-test try/finally cleanup instead.
Unused import: 'readlink' from node:fs/promises is imported but never called in any test.

No negative/failure-mode tests: the file doesn't test what happens when installSkillForAgent is called with an invalid agent type, a missing source directory, or a read-only target. Consistent with project convention.

summary: Pass. The commit adds 17 comprehensive integration tests for Devin skill installation in tests/devin-installer.test.ts. Tests cover all expected behaviors: symlink and copy install modes, global path resolution, agent recognition, listInstalledSkills attribution, and end-to-end config/installer/discovery consistency. Test patterns (try/finally cleanup, vi.spyOn mocking, temp directories) are consistent with existing tests in installer-symlink.test.ts and list-installed.test.ts. Two low-severity issues: 3 unused imports (beforeEach, afterEach, readlink) that should be cleaned up. No source code changes — test-only feature as specified. All 441 tests pass per handoff verification.
